name: Carino: calculates total attribution effects using
snippet: Arithmetic attribution effects do not naturally link over time. This function uses logarithmic smoothing to adjust attribution effects so that they can be summed up over multiple periods.

name: Combining Attribution Effects Over Time - TSG Performance
snippet: When the author's colleagues asked if we'd like to be the first to reveal those details by publishing a paper by David Carino, creator of the much talked about attribution model, we gratefully accepted.

name: Carino Multiple-Period Smoothing - Performance V17 - Confluence
snippet: This multiple-period smoothing calculation follows David Carino, Combining Attribution Effects Over Time, Russell Research Commentary (August 1999).

name: Method and system for multi-period performance attribution
snippet: Carino describes one possible algorithm for linking attribution effects over time that results in a multi-period arithmetic performance attribution system. Furthermore, the result is...

name: Linking of Attributes Results - frongello.com
snippet: Although the compounding of single-period total returns is rather straightforward, the linking of attribution effects introduces additional challenges. We will begin by looking at the two approaches for defining excess return, geometric and arithmetic.
